channel.title: The Tech Docket
channel.description: Daily signal on tech & AI — what the world is searching, and why

item.title: Gemini 3.6 Flash: What Google Launched and What It Skipped
item.description: Google shipped three Flash-tier Gemini models on July 21 — faster and cheaper, but flat on aggregate intelligence. Where 3.5 Pro is, and what Gemini 4 means.

item.title: EU Orders Google to Open Android to Rival AI Assistants
item.description: The EU's two binding DMA orders make Google open 11 Android features to rival AI assistants by 2027 and share search data. What changes, and what it means for India.

item.title: Codex Context Window Cut to 272K: What OpenAI Rolled Back
item.description: OpenAI cut Codex's default context from 372K back to 272K tokens, matching its own pricing cliff. What changed, why, and how Claude and Gemini compare.

item.title: AI Chatbot Data Privacy: What Happens to Your Chats
item.description: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Meta AI set different defaults for training on free chats, retention and opt-outs — compared using each vendor's own policy pages.

item.title: Bonsai 27B: The 27B AI Model That Runs on a Phone, Explained
item.description: PrismML's Bonsai 27B squeezes a 27B-parameter AI model into 3.9 GB to run on flagship phones. What's verified, what's hype, and which phones in India can run it.

item.title: The Real Cost of Running AI: Tokens, GPUs, Power
item.description: OpenAI, Google and Anthropic's live per-token prices, GPU purchase and rental costs, and IEA electricity data, lined up to show what AI really costs to run.

item.title: How to Spot AI-Generated Images and Videos in 2026
item.description: A practical, source-checked guide to Content Credentials, SynthID, platform AI labels, detector accuracy limits, and India's 2026 deepfake rules.
